issues.objection: Tags on 7.27 (non-attachment-to-praise, code-review-discipline, team-culture) cohere with same-tag verses across chapters. Coheres with Ch 2.55-2.72 sthita-prajña (the response-shape dissolved at the level of dualities); coheres with Ch 5.18-5.20 sama-darśana (the operator whose response is even). STRETCHED tagging keeps the operational scope honest where metaphysical reach exceeds it. This verse is sharp and operationally robust (per chapter-7 thesis: STRONG operational analog).

notes: Doctrine-coherence test for 7.27: same-tag verses across chapters preserve consistent stance; the verse extends the doctrine without contradicting prior chapters. PASS.
